emails.body: Can you clarify the location please? Tim and I are in the new building on the 4th floor. Where is "eb2831" in relation to where we sit?

emails.body: Old Building 28th floor room 31! Regards Bj?rn Hagelmann Rac Market Risk Management E-Mail: bjorn.hagelmann@enron.com Office: 1 713 345 7984 Mobil: 1 281 451 4156
